wafregional.geomatchset.GeoMatchConstrai.Docs: An array of `GeoMatchConstraint` objects, which contain the country that you want AWS WAF to search for.

wafregional.geomatchset.Name.Docs: A friendly name or description of the [AWS::WAFRegional::GeoMatchSet](#aws-resource-wafregional-geomatchset). You can't change the name of an `GeoMatchSet` after you create it.
